text:
Created attachment 204828
patch for print/epson-inkjet-printer-escpr

Version 1.6.41 was appeared in 2019-05-10.
PPD files have been added.

1.6.39 (2019-04-17)
PPD file for XP-4100 series was added.

1.6.40 (2019-04-25)
PPD file for XP-2100 series was added.

1.6.41
PPD files for PX-S06 series, WF-2830 series and WF-2850 series are added.
